risks.risk: Provider-specific deployment/apply remains boundary-only after the audit.
risks.mitigation: Add safe apply result recording, rollback evidence, audit evidence, and keep real provider credentials/manual apply gated.

risks.risk: Manual gate evidence is not durable production audit storage.
risks.mitigation: Keep production-like apply fail-closed and require approved manual gate records until durable storage exists.

risks.risk: Final run/artifact IDs require PR evidence refresh after GitHub checks complete.
risks.mitigation: Use refresh-pr-evidence after checks and keep evidence:ci fail-closed.

risks.risk: Local forge may be unavailable on this workstation.
risks.mitigation: GitHub contracts CI remains required before merge.
